subcodes.first_line: O Shaykh! Cast aside the cup and take hold of the ocean in His Name, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, then drink therefrom in spite of every denier [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شیخ ضع القدح و خذ البحر باسمه العزیز الفیاض ثم اشرب منه رغما لکل منکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @symbolism
